strName.description: The code name of the life event.

strInteraction.description: Interaction triggered by this life event. Refers to entry within interactions.json. (Per JsonLifeEvent decomp.)

strStartATC.description: ATC code (homeworld code) where the event starts. Refers to entry within homeworlds.json.

strShipRewards.description: Loot table for ship rewards from this life event. Refers to entry within loot.json.
